title: I survived a missile strike in the Strait of Hormuz, but my friend has not been found
summary_full: Sunil Puniya was on his first sea job when a missile struck the oil tanker Skylight at the start of the Iran war.
summary_public: Sunil Puniya was on his first sea job when a missile struck the oil tanker Skylight at the start of the Iran war.
